name: Overture Maps
description: Building footprint data from Overture Maps — geocode addresses and query 2.5B global building polygons with height, class, floor count, and GeoJSON geometry.
author: soapboxbuild

tools.name: address_search
tools.description: Geocode a free-text address using Nominatim (OpenStreetMap). Returns lat/lon + metadata.

tools.name: get_building
tools.description: Get building footprint (GeoJSON, height, floors, class) at a coordinate from Overture Maps.

tools.name: get_building_by_id
tools.description: Fetch a specific Overture building by its GERS ID. Provide lat/lon hints for speed.

tools.name: nearby_buildings
tools.description: List buildings within a radius of a coordinate, sorted by distance.

env.name: OVERTURE_MCP_URL
env.description: Base URL of the deployed Overture Maps MCP server

env.name: OVERTURE_MCP_SECRET
env.description: Bearer token matching MCP_SERVER_SECRET on the server
